title: Tech Leads Rebound as Stocks Close Highe
description: U.S. stocks finished higher on Feb 18, 2026, with technology stocks leading gains after easing AI disruption fears and strong company news. A clear, compressed snapshot of what moved markets today and why it matters in the immediate window.
author: Market Minute

title: Holiday Pause Then Tech Rebound on Tuesday
description: U.S. markets fell sharply on Feb 12, 2026 as technology shares dropped on renewed AI disruption fears. On Feb 13 markets steadied after cooler inflation data eased rate-cut risk.
author: Market Minute

title: Is the AI Supercycle Still Underpriced by the Market?
description: Massive AI capex is spooking markets - but the supercycle may still have room to run.
author: Market Minute

title: AI Selloff Then CPI Relief Stabilizes Markets
description: U.S. markets fell sharply on Feb 12, 2026 as technology shares dropped on renewed AI disruption fears. On Feb 13 markets steadied after cooler inflation data eased rate-cut risk. A concise snapshot of what moved markets and why it mattered near term.
author: Market Minute

title: Stocks Slip with Oil Up and Risk Appetite Frayed
description: On Thursday, Feb 19, 2026 U.S. stocks declined as concerns over AI disruption, geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices weighed on equities.
author: Market Minute
